summary: The Optimism RPC call divergence is a semicolon-only rustfmt change in the empty blob-versioned-hashes validation error return; no call transaction validation behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 225: M	crates/optimism/rpc/src/eth/call.rs.
The isolated patch only changes an existing `return Err(RpcInvalidTransactionError::BlobTransactionMissingBlobHashes.into_eth_err())` to a semicolon-terminated statement.
No blob versioned hash validation, tx type selection, or RPC error behavior changed.
